description.en_US: Contact/address book plugin. Multi-phone/email, group tags, sort & filter, drag-and-drop avatar, inline edit. Backlinks in detail view. Click phone to copy. Type /name to insert a contact link, /add-contact to quick-add. Top bar + optional FAB (off by default). Auto-refresh on open. Read-only docs. Full i18n.
description.zh_CN: 通讯录插件。多号码、多邮箱、分组标签、排序筛选、拖放头像、内联编辑。详情页展示反链引用。点击号码复制。输入/名字插入链接，/add-contact 快速添加。顶部栏 + 可选浮动按钮（默认关闭）。打开自动刷新。文档只读保护。完整中英文。
description.default: Contact/address book plugin. Multi-phone/email, group tags, sort & filter, drag-and-drop avatar, inline edit. Backlinks in detail view. Click to copy. Type /name for link, /add-contact to add. Top bar + optional FAB (off by default). Auto-refresh. Read-only docs.
